description: Personal HR invite with specific interview date — priority HIGH, action add_interview
subject: Interview Invitation — DevOps Engineer @ N26 (Kirill)
raw_text:
Hi Kirill,

I reviewed your resume and I'd love to invite you personally for an interview for our DevOps Engineer position at N26.

I'd like to schedule a 45-minute call on Tuesday, June 16, 2026 at 3:00 PM CET via Google Meet. I'll send the meeting link separately.

The role is fully remote within the EU. We offer 85,000–105,000 EUR gross/year depending on experience.

Please confirm your availability by June 10.

Best,
Anna Müller
Senior Technical Recruiter
N26 GmbH
anna.mueller@n26.com
